name: Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean mushrooms and remove stems from caps.
2. Brush mushroom caps with salad oil and place in a baking dish (13 by 9 inch for standard serving size).
3. Cook bacon (or sausage) in a skillet until no longer pink; remove from heat.
4. Drain all but 2 tablespoons of drippings from the bacon.
5. Add bread crumbs and chopped stems to the drippings.
6. Spoon the crumb mixture into the oiled mushroom caps.
7. Pour water into the bottom of the baking dish.
8. Bake for 20 minutes.
